title: Assistant Store Manager - Cello - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Cello - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Cello are looking for an experienced Assistant Store Manager based out of Thane. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Cello:
Cello is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Inventory Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cello!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
